import os
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.ticker import MaxNLocator

os.makedirs("figures", exist_ok=True)

plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.size': 14,
    'axes.titlesize': 16,
    'axes.labelsize': 14,
    'xtick.labelsize': 12,
    'ytick.labelsize': 12,
    'legend.fontsize': 11,
    'figure.dpi': 300,
    'savefig.dpi': 300,
    'axes.spines.top': False,
    'axes.spines.right': False,
    'axes.linewidth': 1.2,
    'lines.linewidth': 2.0,
    'lines.markersize': 6,
    'figure.facecolor': 'white',
    'savefig.facecolor': 'white',
    'font.family': 'sans-serif',
    'font.sans-serif': ['DejaVu Sans', 'Arial', 'Helvetica']
})

BASELINE_SUMMARY = {}
RESEARCH_SUMMARY = {}
ABLATION_SUMMARY = {}

def extract_npy_paths(summary):
    if not isinstance(summary, dict):
        return []
    paths = summary.get("exp_results_npy_files", [])
    if isinstance(paths, str):
        return [paths]
    return [p for p in paths if isinstance(p, str) an
